channel.title: Sessions on Prasanna's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sessions on Prasanna's blog

item.title: Pitfalls in session management
item.description: This is a quick post that talks about the usage of sessions in web applications. Sessions is not a new topic for those who’ve used the basic web applications that require a login. Sessions are necessary to overcome the stateless nature of HTTP. They do this by utilising the cookie mechanism of most modern web browsers. A Sessions Analogy In simple terms, a session is used to identify and resume conversation with the service where one left off previously.
